title: Staurochilus loratus
taxonomy: Staurochilus loratus is a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Staurochilus and is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics, including its flowers and growth patterns. The family Orchidaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as orchids. The genus Staurochilus is a small group of orchids native to Southeast Asia.
